prs.title: Docs: avoid unresolved torch.jit Sphinx refs to fix the CICD doc build failure.
Update issue templates and labeler for v2.6 release
drop deprecated stale.yml config
Use fs.pipe() for S3/GCS checkpoint uploads in _atomic_save
Fix LearningRateMonitor TypeError on MPS with float64 lr values
Adds litlogger integration
Improve RichProgreasBar speed performance
Fix ModelParallelStrategy fails with non-distributed checkpoint.
Remove NeptuneLogger integration from PyTorch Lightning
ci: revert part of #21413
Prepare Release Note for 2.6.2 Release
Update Litlogger Integration to latest version
Fix ddp_notebook CUDA fork check to allow passive initialization
fix: FSDP mixed precision initializes params in fp32, not bf16/fp16
chore(tests): update PyTorch versions in CI workflows to include 2.10
chore(pre-commit) : pin docformatter to python3.12 for compatibility
fix(strategies): correct `device_mesh` type hint in FSDP strategies
Sanitize profile filename
Deprecate method `to_torchscript`
Fix `StochasticWeightAveraging`  with infinite epochs
Deprecate Python 3.9 support
fix torch-tensorrt dependency in testing
Fix `_generate_seed_sequence` sampling
ci: move torch-tensorrt to GPU-only test requirements
fix: resolve pkg-resources deprecation issue
docs: add LR scheduler section with automatic optimization examples
Fix RichModelSummary model size display
CI: ignore neptune links for linkcheck
fix: Skip val_check_interval validation when limit_val_batches=0
Docs: pin Intel Neural Compressor validated model list link
Adding test for legacy checkpoint created with 2.6.0
Fix ModelCheckpoint file_exists OOM in DDP
[Fabric] Ignore Keyword Arguments Outside of Callback Signature
Change Import Error Message
Fix FSDP mixed precision semantics and add user warning
Fix free-threaded cleanup race in _replace_dunder_methods
feat: add `suggest_integrations` flag to toggle `integration suggestions` in Trainer logs (default `True`)
fix: restore cached AMP step context after no_grad workaround
Add `log_key_prefix` parameter to `LearningRateMonitor`
fix: set nonzero exit code for SIGTERMException
[tests/core] Updated with BoringModel and added BoringDataModule
